content.cn_text: 第二部分。
content.en_text: Section 2

content.cn_text: 你将听到一个广播节目，节目会给出一些节能建议。
content.en_text: You will hear a radio program giving some advice about saving energy.

content.cn_text: 首先，你有一些时间查看第11至16题。
content.en_text: First, you'll have some time to look at questions 11 to 16.

content.cn_text: 现在请仔细听，并回答第11至16题。
content.en_text: Now listen carefully and answer questions 11 to 16.

content.cn_text: 女士们先生们大家好，感谢收听 Action Radio，我们在这里讨论时事和全球议题。
content.en_text: Hello ladies and gentlemen and thanks for tuning in to Action Radio where we discuss current affairs and global issues.

content.cn_text: 我叫 Jill，今天我将讨论一个非常相关的话题：节约用水的重要性，以及你如何在家中做到这一点。
content.en_text: My name is Jill and today I'll be discussing the very relevant issue of the importance of saving water and how you can do this at home.

content.cn_text: 家庭环境中最常见的能源浪费类型是热量。
content.en_text: The most common type of wasted energy in the domestic environment is heat.

content.cn_text: 不过，由于我家的墙壁隔热很好，我很幸运在这方面没有问题。
content.en_text: However since the walls of my home are very well insulated I am lucky to have no issue with this.

content.cn_text: 然而，我发现由于自己的生活方式，我浪费了大量水。
content.en_text: I've discovered however that I waste a lot of water as a result of my lifestyle.

content.cn_text: 我在网上研究了减少用水的方法，并惊喜地发现这个领域有专家可以立即对我家做出一些改造。
content.en_text: I've researched ways to minimize my water usage online and have been pleasantly surprised to find that there are specialists in the area who can make some changes to my home immediately.

content.cn_text: 唯一的缺点是这些工程相当昂贵，而且没有办法获得经济援助。
content.en_text: The only downside is that the works are quite expensive and there are no means of getting financial assistance.

content.cn_text: 现在，如果各位听众有兴趣减少能源使用，这里有几项你们可以立即做出的简单而积极的改变。
content.en_text: Now if any of you listeners are interested in reducing your energy usage here are a couple of easy and positive changes you can make immediately.

content.cn_text: 许多杂志会建议你把灯泡换成节能灯泡。
content.en_text: A lot of the magazines will recommend that you change your bulbs for those with energy saving capabilities.

content.cn_text: 不过我发现这些对电费影响不大，而且还会严重降低家里的亮度。
content.en_text: However I have found that these make little difference to your electricity bills and they also severely reduce the light levels in your home.

content.cn_text: 相反，只要关闭所有插座和电器，就能立即节省用电量。
content.en_text: Instead simply switch off all plug sockets and appliances to make an immediate saving on your electricity consumption.

content.cn_text: 如果这样省得还不够，你之后也可以尝试调低恒温器。
content.en_text: If this doesn't make enough of a saving for you you could later try turning down the thermostat as well.

content.cn_text: 尽管我的能源供应商因为我及时付款给了我折扣，但按照我的用能量来看，每月账单仍然非常昂贵，所以我决定更换供应商。
content.en_text: Despite the discount that my energy provider gave me for prompt payment my monthly bills were very expensive for the amount of energy that I was using so I decided to change providers.

content.cn_text: 我不仅每月节省了很多钱，这家公司还给了我其他福利。
content.en_text: Not only did I make a huge monthly saving but the company also offered me other perks.

content.cn_text: 例如，我现在可以在线支付每月账单，这让我很高兴，因为这意味着我不再需要开车去银行。
content.en_text: I am now able to pay my monthly bills online for example which I am thrilled about because it means that I no longer have to drive to the bank.

content.cn_text: 等我成为他们客户满一年后，他们还会为我使用的所有节能电器提供扣减优惠。
content.en_text: Once I have been a customer with them for a year they will also offer a deduction for all of the energy saving appliances I use.

content.cn_text: 现在你们很多人家里都会有电表，所以我相信你们都了解它们相关的问题。
content.en_text: Now many of you will have an electricity meter at home so I am sure you will all understand the issues associated with them.

content.cn_text: 它们会占用家里很多空间，如果不能藏进柜子里，看起来也不美观。
content.en_text: They occupy a lot of space in your home and can be unsightly if you are unable to tuck them away in a cupboard.

content.cn_text: 我的表相当大，因为它同时计量燃气和电力，不过幸运的是我可以把它藏在衣帽柜里，既能隐藏起来，也容易取用。
content.en_text: Mine is quite large as it measures both my gas and electricity but I was luckily able to hide it in the coat cupboard where I can keep it hidden but also access it easily.

content.cn_text: 话虽如此，每当我要读表时，都必须用手电筒，因为屏幕太暗，无法准确读出数字。
content.en_text: Having said that whenever I have to take a meter reading I have to use a torch because the screen is too dark to read the numbers correctly.

content.cn_text: 我最近给房子扩建了一个新浴室，里面装有低能耗锅炉，这样我就可以毫无负罪感地洗长时间淋浴。
content.en_text: I have recently had an extension built on my house to make room for a new bathroom complete with the low energy boiler so I can take long showers guilt free.

content.cn_text: 墙壁又厚又隔热，但遗憾的是窗户有点漏风，所以我得花钱升级它。
content.en_text: The walls are nice and thick and well insulated but unfortunately the window is a little drafty so I am going to have to invest in upgrading it.

content.cn_text: 说到可再生能源，我最初考虑过在屋顶安装太阳能板，而不是使用成本较低的低能耗锅炉。
content.en_text: Speaking of renewable energy I initially considered installing solar panels on the roof instead of using a low energy boiler which was the less expensive option.

content.cn_text: 最后我认为这些太阳能板装在我家会显得太难看，尽管从技术上来说它们很容易操作。
content.en_text: In the end I decided that the panels would look too ugly on my house despite that they were technically easy to operate.

content.cn_text: 在听剩余讲话之前，你有一些时间查看第17至20题。
content.en_text: Before you hear the rest of the talk you have some time to look at questions 17 to 20.

content.cn_text: 现在请听，并回答第17至20题。
content.en_text: Now listen and answer questions 17 to 20.

content.cn_text: 如果你像我一样喜欢洗很长时间的淋浴，那么从泡澡改成淋浴并不能帮助你减少用水量。
content.en_text: Now if you are a fan of taking long showers like I am then switching from bath to showers will not help to reduce your water usage.

content.cn_text: 相反，这里有一些小而有效的改变可以尝试。
content.en_text: Instead here are some small but effective changes you can make.

content.cn_text: 例如，泡茶时，在烧水前量好所需水量；刷牙时，用一杯水而不是一直开着水龙头。
content.en_text: When making a cup of tea for example measure out the amount of water that you need before boiling it and when brushing your teeth use a cup of water instead of a running tap.

content.cn_text: 我试过把洗衣机装满后再启动，但发现衣服洗不干净，所以我不推荐这样做。
content.en_text: I tried filling up my washing machine before switching it on but I found that the clothes were not thoroughly cleaned so I would not recommend this.

content.cn_text: 如果你的水龙头关掉后还滴水，你应该叫水管工来修理，因为这会浪费大量水。
content.en_text: If your tap drips when it is turned off then you should call a plumber to fix it as this can result in a lot of water being wasted.

content.cn_text: 在结束今天的节目之前，我想回答两个听众经常问的问题。
content.en_text: Before finishing today's show I would like to address two questions that we often get asked by listeners.

content.cn_text: 上周我们回答了如何计算家用电器运行费用的问题，收到了很好的反馈。
content.en_text: We had some great feedback about our answer to last week's question on how to calculate the price involved in powering domestic appliances.

content.cn_text: 那么来看看这周的问题吧。
content.en_text: So let's see how we do this week.

content.cn_text: 本周最常被问到的问题之一是：观看电影时，哪种设备最省电。
content.en_text: One of our most commonly asked questions this week was which device is the lowest energy option for watching films.

content.cn_text: 最简单的答案是，屏幕越小，耗能越低。
content.en_text: The simplest answer is that the smaller the screen the lower the energy used.

content.cn_text: 有位听众来信问了一个让我发笑的问题，答案是：是的，太阳能板只有在太阳出来时才工作。
content.en_text: One of our listeners wrote in with a question that made me chuckle and the answer is yes solar panels only work when the sun is out.

content.cn_text: 说正经的，你们中很多人想知道恒温器设定到什么温度最高效。
content.en_text: Now on a more serious note a number of you wanted to know what the most efficient temperature is to set the thermostat to.

content.cn_text: 答案是，你把它设得越接近室温，耗能就越低。
content.en_text: The answer is that the closer you set it to room temperature the lower the energy used.

content.cn_text: 在下周再见之前，我给大家最后一个小建议：离开房间时关灯。
content.en_text: Before I say goodbye until next week I'll leave you with one last tip. Turn off the lights when you leave the room.

content.cn_text: 第二部分到此结束。现在你有半分钟时间检查答案。
content.en_text: That is the end of section 2. You now have half a minute to check your answers.

groups.desc: Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.
groups.title: Questions 11–16

items.title: What was Jill surprised to find?

options.title: A
options.content: Some work to reduce the water usage to her house could be done soon.

items.analysis: 答案解析：第11题问 Jill 惊讶地发现了什么，原文说 specialists can make some changes to my home immediately，对应 A。

items.title: What does Jill say every family can do straight away?
items.analysis: 答案解析：第12题问每个家庭马上可以做什么，原文说 switch off all plug sockets and appliances，对应 C。

items.title: What pleased Jill about the energy provider?

options.title: A
options.content: reduction in price for prompt payment

options.title: C
options.content: having a reduction in price of the energy-saving sources

items.analysis: 答案解析：第13题问能源供应商哪一点让 Jill 高兴，原文说 able to pay monthly bills online, thrilled about，对应 B。

items.title: What difficulty does Jill have with the energy meters?

options.title: B
options.content: The figures are hard to read accurately.

options.title: C
options.content: She can’t tell whether they’re for electricity or for gas.

items.analysis: 答案解析：第14题问 Jill 使用能源表有什么困难，原文说 screen is too dark to read the numbers correctly，对应 B。

items.title: What kind of energy-saving method is Jill going to take next?

options.title: B
options.content: Have the walls checked for their insulation level.

items.analysis: 答案解析：第15题问 Jill 下一步会采取哪种节能方法，原文说 window is drafty, invest in upgrading it，对应 C “Install double-glazed windows”。

items.title: Why is Jill doubtful about renewable energy?

options.title: A
options.content: She thinks it’s unsuitable for her house.

options.title: B
options.content: She doesn’t understand the technical details.

items.analysis: 答案解析：第16题问 Jill 为什么对可再生能源存疑，原文说 panels would look too ugly on my house，说明她认为不适合自己的房子，对应 A。

groups.desc:
Choose TWO letters, A-E.
Which TWO water-saving tips does Jill recommend?
groups.title: Questions 17-18

list.title: B
list.content: keep the washing machine full before using it

list.title: C
list.content: boil only as much water as you need

list.title: D
list.content: turn off the taps while you are brushing your teeth

items.title: Which TWO water-saving tips does Jill recommend?
items.analysis:
答案解析：第17-18题问 Jill 推荐哪两个节水建议。原文推荐 boil only as much water as you need，对应 C。
答案解析：第17-18题另一个推荐建议是修理漏水水龙头，原文说 call a plumber to fix it，对应 E。注意原文提到刷牙用杯子，但选项 D 是 “turn off the taps while brushing”，并非原文表达；答案给的是 C 和 E。

items.title: Which TWO water-saving tips does Jill recommend?
items.analysis:
答案解析：第17-18题问 Jill 推荐哪两个节水建议。原文推荐 boil only as much water as you need，对应 C。
答案解析：第17-18题另一个推荐建议是修理漏水水龙头，原文说 call a plumber to fix it，对应 E。注意原文提到刷牙用杯子，但选项 D 是 “turn off the taps while brushing”，并非原文表达；答案给的是 C 和 E。

groups.desc:
Choose TWO letters, A-E.
Which TWO topics do people most frequently ask about?
groups.title: Questions 19-20

list.title: A
list.content: the ideal temperature setting on the thermostat

list.title: B
list.content: whether to leave the light on or not

list.title: C
list.content: whether to use a computer or laptop to watch movies

list.title: D
list.content: how to work out the operating cost of appliances

list.title: E
list.content: whether solar panels only work on sunny days

items.title: Which TWO topics do people most frequently ask about?
items.analysis:
答案解析：第19-20题问人们最常问的两个话题。原文说 commonly asked question 是看电影用哪种设备最省电，对应 C。
答案解析：第19-20题另一个常问话题是恒温器的理想温度设定，原文说 wanted to know the most efficient temperature to set the thermostat，对应 A。

items.title: Which TWO topics do people most frequently ask about?
items.analysis:
答案解析：第19-20题问人们最常问的两个话题。原文说 commonly asked question 是看电影用哪种设备最省电，对应 C。
答案解析：第19-20题另一个常问话题是恒温器的理想温度设定，原文说 wanted to know the most efficient temperature to set the thermostat，对应 A。
